title: ononis angustissima var. polyclada
intro: Ononis angustissima var. polyclada, also known as the narrow-leaved spiny restharrow, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the pea family Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ononis angustissima var. polyclada are attributed to its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for internal use, or applied topically as a cream or ointment for skin conditions.
